item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 5th May
item.description:
Large oak tree came down and has now been cleared. Customer is worried about further oaks coming down and wants to know if there are further inspections taking place along this stretch for the existing trees.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 5th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference footway closure 4000x1800x30mm ramp up over tree roots stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drain cover on corner needs to be fixed in place, 5th May
item.description:
Drain cover on the corner by mini-roundabout needs fixing inplace. I have relocated the drain cover on numerous occassions when it has been knocked out of place (presumably by HGV mounting pavement) When knocked out it exposes a large hole. I noticed that it looks as though there are Hex-bolts which should hold it in place....which need replacing to hold it securely in place
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Cheltenham Road, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Volunteer litter picker, 5th May
item.description:
I have left a bag of recycling waste by bin ref:- 0230 which is close to the Grayhound pub junction.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Cheltenham Road, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Litter picking bags ready for collection

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 5th May
item.description:

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 5th May

item.title: Pile, 5th May
item.description:
That is a big pile of dog fowling poop bags growing there. No bin to put poop bags in and people are just making a tower of poo bags.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A40, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Covers, Gratings & Frames problem, 5th May
item.description:
2hr Broken cover. Make safe with x 2 2m barriers with x 2 sandbags Std TM with temp FW closure S81 raised for cover (Broken Chamber Cover/Frame)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 5th May
item.description:
Report ID: 9385517: Tree with dead bough which needs pruning V
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs wrong way round, 5th May
item.description:
I’m cox’s meadow there are two signs that have been put back up back to front. Not sure why they came down but saw the contractors do it a few weeks ago.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Judes Walk, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: 20 inch pothole that is getting excessively deep and in layers, 5th May
item.description:
Willowleaze side of the green on the bend outside the last house prior to the last block of flats. It is under the tree
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Willowleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Porthole become a serious hazard, 5th May
item.description:
The large area of potholes have been previously reported by many people since they appeared in February yet nothing has been done about. Cars are now swerving across the road to avoid them making it extremely dangerous with me witnessing one drive hitting an on coming car last weekend. I note your responses on previous cases where these potholes have been raised and the lack on concern has not gone unnoticed by residents. These potholes require urgent attention before someone is seriously injured on what is an extremely busy road and one that school children use everyday for cycling to school.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Hatherley Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Our street light is not coming on it is right out side our house our house number is 58 Meadowleaze Gloucester GL2 0PS, 4th May
item.description:
Our light isnt coming on and it is dark out the street light is out side 58 Meadowleaze Gloucester GL2 0PS it hasn’t been on since yesterday night
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Willowleaze, Longlevens, Gloucester
